caption: In an indoor setting that appears to be a formal meeting or presentation, a man and a woman are seated. The man wears a light brown suit jacket over a white shirt and a brown tie, while the woman wears a dark jacket over a dark top and glasses. Both individuals have identification badges pinned to their jackets. The man holds a microphone in his left hand and gestures outward with his right arm. In the initial sequence, he extends his right arm fully toward someone off-camera. As the scene progresses, he brings his right hand back toward his chest, gesturing near the microphone while continuing to speak. The woman sits beside him, looking toward the man with a neutral expression. A white folder or set of papers rests on the table in front of her. The background consists of dark-colored seating and other partially visible attendees.
